---
title: "KUB Datalab slides"
format: html
---

- [Intro](slides/intro.qmd){target="_blank"} [pdf](downloads/intro.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Normalfordelingen](slides/normalfordelingen.qmd){target="_blank"} [pdf](downloads/normalfordelingen.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [SEM](slides/SEM.qmd){target="_blank"} [pdf](downloads/SEM.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Kategoriske data](slides/kategoriske.qmd){target="_blank"} [pdf](downloads/kategoriske.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Lineær regression](slides/linreg.qmd){target="_blank"} [pdf](downloads/linreg.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Logistisk regression](slides/logistisk.qmd){target="_blank"} [pdf](downloads/logistisk.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Power beregninger](slides/power.qmd){target="_blank"} [pdf](downloads/power.pdf){target="_blank"}
